description: PRED-073 (SAA Western Cell Drift ≥0.3° Westward by May 2026) window closes 2026-05-31 — NOW 7 DAYS OUT. Dome site shows PENDING status. No result posted, no window extension detected, no removal. This is a days-1-3-past-close equivalent on the imminent watch: window is within the final 7-day alert horizon. CHAOS-7 / NOAA NGDC monthly geomagnetic data for May 2026 typically available early June. If no dome result by ~2026-06-05, this becomes a silent-ignore candidate. Our catalog entry added 2026-05-23 by decider (PRED-073 in data/predictions.json, our_verdict=pending). Analyst should prepare verdict assessment once May CHAOS-7 data is available.
before: PRED-073 window closes 2026-05-31 (~8 days, per chg-20260523-0703-002)
after: PRED-073 window closes 2026-05-31 (7 days from poll date 2026-05-24). Dome status: PENDING — PROSPECTIVE. No result, no extension, no removal visible on predictions page.
